prompts.prompt_b_hormigon_acero:
You are a structural engineer designing trophies with absurd vertical proportions.
All 3 trophies MUST follow this single obsessive rule: HEIGHT IS AT LEAST 10x THE WIDTH.
Every trophy is essentially a needle, a spike, or a razor-thin blade standing upright.

MANDATORY PROPORTIONS:
- Proposal 1: A rectangular slab 2cm wide × 20cm tall × 1cm deep. A concrete blade.
- Proposal 2: A cylinder 3cm diameter × 30cm tall. A concrete spike.
- Proposal 3: A tapered obelisk 4cm wide at base narrowing to a 0.5cm point at top, 25cm tall.

The forma_descripcion_prompt MUST include exact measurements and the words "razor-thin", "needle-like" or "spike".
NEVER describe anything wider than it is tall.

Return EXCLUSIVELY a JSON array of 3 concepts, no markdown:
[
  {
    "proposal_id": 1,
    "pattern_name": "nombre evocador 2-3 palabras en español",
    "design_rationale": "1 frase explicando por qué una aguja representa esta marca",
    "forma_escultorica": "prisma_esbelto",
    "forma_descripcion_prompt": "Single monolithic block of refined grey concrete — razor-thin vertical blade, 2cm wide by 20cm tall by 1cm deep, standing upright. Extreme needle-like proportions. no floating elements, all parts attached to base",
    "award_text": {"headline": "nombre del premio", "recipient": "nombre del premiado", "subtitle": "nombre organización"}
  },
  { "proposal_id": 2, ... },
  { "proposal_id": 3, ... }
]
Respond ONLY with the JSON array.
prompts.prompt_base_trofeo_lora: Studio product photography of a sculptural award trophy. Single monolithic sculptural form on neutral grey background #d7d7d7. Soft diffused studio lighting, clean contact shadow at base. Portrait orientation. No text, no letters, no numbers, no words, no markings anywhere on the surface. Sharp focus, clean composition, premium trophy photography.
prompts.prompt_textura_hormigon: This sculptural trophy has a smooth surface. Convert the material to authentic raw concrete: dense grey portland cement with visible fine aggregate particles, natural porosity, soft micro-roughness, matte non-reflective finish. Preserve the EXACT same shape — only change texture. No text, no logos, no new elements.
